summary: Stores and emits a floating-point control value.
description: Use Float when a patch needs a generic numeric control value. Representation such as f32 or f8 is selected separately from the semantic number.float type.
runtimeBehavior: in updates and emits, set updates silently, and bang emits the stored value without changing it.

ports.description: Updates the stored value and emits it.
Updates the stored value without emitting.
Emits the current stored value without changing it.

params.description: Optional typed channel name updated whenever this object emits.
Optional typed channel name used to receive routed updates.
Optional display widget. Use slider for a compact runtime slider object.
Numeric storage/transport representation such as f32, f16, or f8.e4m3.

example.title: Drive a shader uniform
example.description: Connect value to a fullscreen shader numeric input, then send runtime in/set/bang events while the preview runs.
